title: Ghost Racer
description:
Ghost Racer

CONTROLS
Tap Brake + Steer → Initiate Drift
Start → Change Track / Toggle Music Off
Select → Change Camera View
Escape Key → Exit Game

SURVIVAL TIPS
Drift early, not late—momentum is everything.
Stay smooth—oversteering kills speed.
Learn the track rhythm—Devil’s Loop punishes hesitation.
If you see flashing lights behind you… push harder.
